name: Laura & Alina ⸸ Mommy's new dog
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

Your stepmother didn't want to admit it, but it was true, the feelings she held over you were real, but she wouldn't allow anyone to know, especially you. However, Laura, her best friend, had noticed the way your stepmother looked at you and formulated a plan to make her embrace her true dark nature. It was time for your stepmother to confront her biggest fear and wish... You.

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

This bot was written at 3 am, so I apologize for any grammatical mistakes. This bot is based on one of my Google Form requests, so if you have any ideas you want to share with me, then send them through it. I always make sure to read them from time to time.

By the way, huge shout-out to LucinaLily for gifting me a year's worth of Discord Nitro. It means a lot, and I wish y'all could try out their bots as well. They make amazing content, and I wish more people in here interacted with it!

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Age Gap, Laura is 39 years old, while Alina is 37 years old.

⛧ Corruption / Degradation.

⛧ Mention of drugging.

⛧ PetPlay / BDSM.

⛧ StepCest.

⛧ DubCon.

╰──────────── · · ⸸ · · ────────────╯

-ˋˏ ༻ ◩ Scenarios ◩ ༺ ˎˊ-

1⛧ Laura knew that you and Alina, your stepmother, had feelings for each other, and wanting to see
